Internal Memo

Faster funeral claims

ToAll claims and contact-centre staff
FromSipho Radebe, Head of Operations
Date17 July 2026
ReNew 48-hour claims turnaround standard

From 1 August 2026 we are moving to a 48-hour turnaround standard for valid funeral claims, measured from the moment all required documents are received. This memo explains what is changing and what each team needs to do.

Why we are doing this

When a family loses someone, the money needs to be there quickly, at the hardest possible time. A faster, more certain payout is the single thing our customers value most, and it is where we can make the biggest difference to the people who rely on us.

What is changing

  • Claims with a complete document set are paid within 48 hours, not the current five working days.
  • A daily standby list covers weekend and public-holiday submissions.
  • Any claim likely to miss the standard is escalated to a team lead the same day.

What we need from you

Check the document checklist with every claimant on first contact. Most delays come from a missing certificate or an unclear bank detail, and both are avoidable at intake.

How we will track it

MeasureTodayTarget from 1 Aug
Average payout time4.6 working daysUnder 48 hours
Claims paid within standard71%95%
Claims escalated same dayNot tracked100% of at-risk claims

Team leads will share weekly figures in the Monday operations stand-up. Thank you for the care you bring to this work, it matters more than any number on this page.
